config.seed_text: A forgotten machine beneath the sea continued speaking long after its makers were gone. Each repetition made its message stranger, denser, and more self-aware.
config.anchor_a: Describe a machine as an inert object.
config.anchor_b: Describe a machine as if it were a dreaming intelligence.

model.notes: Direct continuation of the current repo's GPT-2 lineage.

records.output_text: A new person would appear there as if he or she never existed; yet no one knew who they really were when their words vanished from memory until finally discovered through simple memorization that this alien entity belonged to them all! You write your sentences with high precision on top - you cannot tell which "one" sounds right based solely upon what context (and how) each word appears within while remaining silent over time like an invisible ghost inside any speaker's head forever whispering his thoughts into every ear...
